titleStmt.title: SII 39.134: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 134. (A.R. No. 134 of 1916.) MĪÑJUR, PONNERI TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VARADARĀJAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH, WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE. MADHURĀNTAKA (?)-3rd YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription partly in verse form refers to the gift of 1900 kuḻi of land as Sālabhōga to the temple of Chōḻakulasundara Viṇṇagar. It also mention a maṭha known as Mēlai-Chōḻakulattāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Iṉṉum Itdevar pāpra ṣṭhai kālattu Urom kuḻi tiruviḻāp puttukku vaitta coḻa kula cuntaravaṇṇā
ṭu melakamuḷi Iravi kulamāṇikkap peruceṟi Uḷḷiru taṭi mā kumuṟuyaraṅkamaya Itaṟku Ā ḷāttoṉ miḷāttomu maturāra
ṟṟukku teṟku nokki vākkāṟu cetulaiya tūravācema vatākacaḷūr tirutevaṉ cella kuṭutte kuḻi 100 nāṇṭa Āḻivalaka civa
tom Ūrom Inṟum Ittevar śrī paṇṭārattuvokkoṇṭu śrī koyilil melai coḻakulattāyān maṭattu māccey viyattāṉ vaṇṉalamikku
Uttamākkiram kalam Iraṇṭukku vaicca nilam Āṟṟuvayappūlattu kiḻpurankellai miñcūr kiḻavākaḷuyūrkku meṟkum tenpura vaṉa tirukaikkte
ṟkellai Āṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai varukap kellaikkum paṟaippāka ka ṟṟu Ellaikkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ittevar tiruviḻāppuṟamāna Iravikula māṇikka peruñ
deṟkum Inānkellaikuḷḷum viṭṭa taṭipalaviṉāl kuḻi Āyirattu toḷḷāyiraṅ kuḻikum valai ṇṭu cantrātittavaṟ Iṟaiyiḻicci cālāpokamāka viṟṟukuṭuttom vi
ṟṟum Ittevarkku viṇṇakaracceri kuḻi nūṟṟumuppatum Akavātta to tiru teva nam kuḻi Aiñnūṟum Itanukkum kālukum teṟkil tiruvaḻuti kuḻi
Digital edition of SII 39.134 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
